name: Florida Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup grated orange rind (from two oranges)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the grated orange rind, beaten egg, and orange juice to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour, cinnamon, and baking powder, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Drop teaspoon-sized portions of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
